---
name: User Profile — Ayric
description: Ayric is building an AI-narrated game engine (Grand Adventure Engine); uses Cowork for design sessions and Claude Code for implementation
type: user
---

Ayric is building the Grand Adventure Engine (GAE) — an AI assistant that narrates and DMs a world for players. Uses Cowork sessions for design/architecture and hands off to Claude Code for implementation. Refers to Claude Code persona as "Thadds" / Sir Thaddeus.
